case_title: CHARLES A. LIECHTI VS. CITY PARK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LIECHTI, CHARLES A. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY PARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF LIECHTI, CHARLES A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2008 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY PARK
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIECHTI, CHARLES A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY PARK THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH NEGLIGENCE OF DEFENDANT RESULTING IN PLAINTIFF'S LOSS.
